businessSummary.oneLiner: Government and commercial AI data analytics platform leader — Gotham (defense), Foundry (enterprise), AIP (AI platform) three-pillar system
businessSummary.description: Palantir provides data integration, analytics, and AI decision-making platforms for government and commercial organizations. FY2025 revenue $4.48B (+70% YoY), adjusted operating margin 57%. Friday close $150.95 (-1.66%). Finbold: PLTR death cross formed — 50-day MA crossed below 200-day MA, echoing October 2021 pattern. YTD -10%. AIPCon 9 (3/12) major partnership announcements. NVIDIA sovereign AI DC joint announcement. Motley Fool: 'Up 2,200%+ since 2023, can it continue?' Market cap $361.0B, P/E ~240x.
howTheyMakeMoney: Government contracts: Gotham/Apollo — defense, intelligence agencies, NATO (~55% revenue)
Commercial contracts: Foundry/AIP — enterprise AI platform, Boot Camp strategy (~45% revenue)
SaaS model: Annual subscriptions + expansion-based. Net Dollar Retention 120%+

keyMetrics.name: P/E Ratio
keyMetrics.interpretation: Extreme premium. Reflects growth story and AI monopolistic positioning.

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Still elevated even factoring FY2026 earnings. PEG 2.55.

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth (YoY)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Explosive growth. US commercial segment +109% leading.

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: High-margin SaaS model. Adjusted operating margin 57%.

keyMetrics.name: Gross Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Top-tier among software companies. Maximum pricing power.

keyMetrics.name: FCF
keyMetrics.interpretation: FCF margin 46.94%. Nearly half of revenue converts to free cash flow.

growthDrivers.title: AIPCon 9 Mission-Critical Partnerships Announced (3/12)
growthDrivers.description: BusinessWire (3/12): GE Aerospace (military aviation maintenance), Centrus Energy (nuclear AI), Ondas (drone ISR), World View (stratospheric ISR), LG CNS multi-year contracts signed.

growthDrivers.title: Polymarket Sports Betting Integrity Platform — New TAM
growthDrivers.description: Barchart (3/13): Vergence AI engine-based sports integrity platform with Polymarket+TWG AI. Entering prediction markets as entirely new TAM.

growthDrivers.title: NVIDIA+Palantir Sovereign AI DC — GTC-Linked Catalyst
growthDrivers.description: Yahoo Finance (3/13): Turnkey sovereign AI DC joint announcement. Tomorrow's GTC keynote may reveal additional details.

growthDrivers.title: Motley Fool: +2,200% Since 2023 — Growth Momentum Sustainability
growthDrivers.description: Motley Fool (3/11): US commercial +115% guidance, high Boot Camp conversion rates. Debate over whether dramatic growth justifies valuation premium.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 20+ years of government/defense AI track record. Security clearance as entry barrier. 'Ontology' platform is the unique moat as AI-human collaboration interface.

moats.description: Highest US DoD/intelligence agency security clearances. Competitors cannot enter.
'Tool factory' for AI and human agents. Unique in battlefield planning, target identification.
5-day intensive pilot to acquire enterprise customers, then expand company-wide. High conversion rates.

competitors.name: Microsoft (Azure AI)
competitors.detail: Cloud AI platform. General approach vs Palantir specialized analytics

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI competition. Inferior in scale and profitability

competitors.name: Anduril
competitors.detail: Defense AI startup. Growing fast but smaller than Palantir

analystOpinions.notableComment: 20 analysts Buy consensus, $192.68 (+28%). MarketBeat basis. Median $200. Valuation concern vs growth momentum split. Buy maintained despite death cross.

risks.title: Death Cross Formed — October 2021 Pattern Repeat
risks.description: Finbold: 50-day crossed below 200-day. In 2021, brief rally was followed by -80% decline. Critical technical warning signal.

risks.title: Extreme Valuation — P/E 240x, Forward P/E 114x
risks.description: Growth is outstanding but valuation demands flawless execution. Earnings miss would trigger sharp decline.

risks.title: Stock-Based Compensation Dilution — +4.67% YoY
risks.description: Annual share count increase of 4.67%. Long-term per-share value dilution risk.

risks.title: Government Budget Cuts Risk
risks.description: 55% of revenue from government. Budget cuts would impact pipeline.

risks.title: YTD -10% — Market Sentiment Deteriorating
risks.description: Correction after +2,200% surge. Profit-taking selling pressure possible.

buyReasons.title: AIPCon 9 Partnership Explosion — Real Contracts Secured
buyReasons.rationale: GE Aerospace, Centrus, Ondas, World View, LG CNS mission-critical multi-year contracts. Revenue visibility improved.

buyReasons.title: US Commercial +115% Guidance — Explosive Growth
buyReasons.rationale: High Boot Camp conversion rates. Accelerating enterprise AI adoption. TAM expansion.

buyReasons.title: FCF Margin 47% — Cash Generation Machine
buyReasons.rationale: Nearly half of revenue is free cash flow. D/E 0.03, net cash $6.95B.

buyReasons.title: NVIDIA Sovereign AI DC + GTC-Linked Catalyst
buyReasons.rationale: Tomorrow's GTC keynote may reveal NVIDIA+Palantir sovereign DC details. AI infrastructure-level partner.

overallOpinion: Palantir at $150.95 has formed a death cross — the most dangerous technical signal.
The October 2021 precedent saw a brief rally followed by -80% further decline.
However, unlike 2021, today shows +70% revenue growth, 47% FCF margin, and exploding real contracts — fundamentals are different.
Tomorrow's GTC may provide NVIDIA+Palantir sovereign DC details as catalyst.
Technical weakness vs fundamental strength. Given P/E 240x, Hold stance — dollar-cost averaging for long-term conviction.

investmentVerdict.summary: Death cross technical risk + P/E 240x burden. Fundamentals strong but valuation and technicals conflict. Dollar-cost average approach.
